findings.text: Risk scores at or above policy.max_risk now return allow, including requests that should be denied for exceeding the maximum risk.
Admin users are now denied unconditionally, reversing the previous admin override behavior.
The blocked_states deny check was removed, so blocked changes can be allowed when owner_approved is true or owner approval is not required.
summarize_recent now selects limit + 1 results, returning one more item than requested.
The audit label prefix changed from decision: to governance-decision:, which can break callers expecting the documented or existing label format.
